calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Rachel C. Gillotti.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Grand View University.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Rachel C. Gillotti.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on June 1, 2016 and served on April 17, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on June 28, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 28, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 31, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Grand View University, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rachel C. Gillotti, as follows:

Damages - $6,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,857.59.
Attorney Fees - $925.00.
Collection Costs as provided for in the Code of Federal Regulations - $3,943.43.
Costs - $319.00.

Total - $15,045.02.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
